name: C3 Metals Inc.
description: C3 Metals Inc. is a junior mineral exploration company focused on creating substantive value through the discovery and development of large copper and gold deposits. The company's flagship project is the Jasperoide copper-gold project located in the highly productive Andahuaylas-Yauri belt of Peru. Additionally, C3 Metals holds a 100% interest in several highly prospective copper-gold exploration licenses in Jamaica, including the Bellas Gate project. Through systematic exploration and drilling, the company aims to identify and delineate significant copper-gold resources in these premier mining jurisdictions.
